{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/253-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_
2. _The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern_
3. _What Makes a Composite Skills Agent_
4. _The Sub-Agent Registry_
5. _Configuration: How Principals Build Their Ensembles_
6. _Coordination and Disagreement Resolution_
7. _Economics of Combinatorial Replication_
8. _Seven Domains of Application_
9. _Integration with OKWF Infrastructure_
10. _Risks Specific to Composite Architectures_
11. _Open Questions_
12. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.26)
* [169-table-of-contents|169-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.21)
* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.15)

* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md]

* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete|254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete.md]
* [2. The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern|255-2-the-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md]
* [3. What Makes a Composite Skills Agent|256-3-what-makes-a-composite-skills-agent.md]
* [5. Configuration: How Principals Build Their Ensembles|258-5-configuration-how-principals-build-their-ensembl.md]
* [6. Coordination and Disagreement Resolution|259-6-coordination-and-disagreement-resolution.md]
* [Abstract|252-abstract.md]
* [Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)|270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch.md]
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md]
* [Appendix C: Configuration Template Example|271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example.md]
* [Table of Contents|137-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|154-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|211-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|308-table-of-contents.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete|254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete.md] _33%_
* [Abstract|252-abstract.md] _29%_
* [2. The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern|255-2-the-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md] _29%_
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md] _25%_
* [6. Coordination and Disagreement Resolution|259-6-coordination-and-disagreement-resolution.md] _21%_
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md] _17%_
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md] _17%_
* [Содержание|190-содержание.md] _17%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [Table of Contents|211-table-of-contents.md] _33%_
* [1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete|254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete.md] _33%_

* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md] _25%_
